name: Fylla
description: Editorial, minimal agency template. Cream background with high-contrast black typography. Heavy reliance on whitespace, thin dividers, oversized sans-serif display type, and monospace accents for secondary UI labels.

background.primaryDescription: Cream / off-white. Warm, slightly yellow undertone. Used as full-page background.
background.surfaceDescription: No raised cards or surfaces — content sits directly on background. Image containers use rounded rectangles only.

text.primaryDescription: Near-black. Used for headlines, body, navigation.
text.secondaryNote: No grey body text — secondary hierarchy is achieved through size and weight, not color.

border.defaultDescription: Hairline dividers and outlined circles use full black at 1px. No soft greys.

accent.note: No chromatic accent. The black-on-cream contrast IS the accent system.

display.alternativeMatch: Could also be Söhne, General Sans, or similar geometric grotesque
display.usage: All headlines (H1, H2, section titles like 'OUR VALUES', 'FEATURED WORK', 'BRANDING')
display.characteristics: Geometric sans-serif, slightly condensed feel at large sizes, neutral, modern grotesque

body.characteristics: Same family as display, used at smaller sizes with regular weight

mono.usage: Navigation links, footer links, section labels ('WHAT WE DO'), step numbers ('01', '02'), CTAs ('SEE ALL WORK', 'MORE TEMPLATES'), URL display, copyright line
mono.characteristics: Slab-ish monospace with circular dots and clean terminals. Always set in UPPERCASE with letterspacing for these UI labels.

displayXL.usage: Hero headline ('We are a digital agency from Lisbon.')
displayXL.notes: Tight leading, period included as deliberate punctuation.

displayL.notes: Big, anchoring typographic statements. Always uppercase, no letter spacing adjustment.

headingM.usage: Card titles ('Pages', 'CMS', 'Utility Pages' in footer; project titles like 'Dancing Stars')

labelMono.usage: Navigation items, footer link lists, button labels, section eyebrows ('WHAT WE DO'), URL strings, '© MADE BY GOLA TEMPLATES'

labelMonoS.usage: Step numbers in circles ('01', '02', '03'), social icon initials ('IN', 'PI', 'TW'), tiny meta dates ('2023')

spacing.sectionPaddingYNote: Generous vertical rhythm. Sections breathe with 96-200px top/bottom padding on desktop.

grid.type: 12-col with frequent 2-col splits (50/50 hero, content-image; 4-col for service grids)

layout.asymmetry: Heavy use of asymmetric two-column layouts: large headline left + image right, or label-on-left + content-on-right.

dividers.use: Thin (1px) full-black horizontal and vertical rules separate sections and grid cells.
dividers.treatment: Lines extend edge-to-edge or between content blocks; never decorative — always structural.

imageContainers.aspectRatio: Variable, often 4:3 or 3:4 for portraits and 16:10 for hero images.
imageContainers.treatment: Photos placed in rounded rectangles with no border or shadow; sit directly on cream background.

navigation.type: Top bar, logo left + links center + CTA right + social right + theme toggle
navigation.cta: Solid black pill with white mono text 'LET'S TALK'
navigation.socialIcons: Circular outlined buttons with 2-letter mono initials inside (IN, PI, TW)
navigation.themeToggle: Circular outlined button with sun/moon icon
navigation.underline: 1px black hairline below the entire nav, full-width

iconCircle.shape: Perfect circle, 1px black border, transparent fill

card.type: Borderless. Content sits in grid cells separated only by 1px dividers.
card.treatment: No background, no shadow. Often paired: small icon + heading + 1-2 line description.

iconLineart.style: Thin (1px) geometric line illustrations — concentric circles, stacked triangles, four-point sparkle, ripple shapes

footer.linkStyle: Mono UPPERCASE, 13px, vertical rhythm with 12-16px gaps
footer.divider: Thin black hairline between footer columns and above copyright row
footer.copyright: © MADE BY [NAME] — left aligned mono caps, with PRIVACY link far right

imageCard.metaLayout: Title bottom-left, year top-right or far right, both outside the image

iconography.style: Geometric line art, 1px stroke, no fill, no rounded caps
iconography.size: 48-56px in service grid; small SVG marks for nav logo

imagery.treatment: Editorial portrait photography, muted natural color palette (sage greens, warm tans, dusty pinks)
imagery.subjects: People in considered poses, slight environmental context, natural light
imagery.framing: Subjects often off-center, with negative space used compositionally
imagery.filters: None apparent — photos sit at native warmth

interactionPatterns.hover: Likely subtle — opacity shifts on links, button background swap on CTAs
interactionPatterns.viewOverlay: On portfolio cards, a small dark pill labeled 'VIEW' appears centered on the image (visible on Dancing Stars card)
interactionPatterns.links: Underlined on inline text links (e.g., 'GOLA TEMPLATES'), no underline on nav

tone.voice: Confident, editorial, restrained. Short declarative headlines with periods. No exclamation marks.
tone.headlineStyle: Statement-of-being ('We are a digital agency from Lisbon.') paired with a one-sentence elaboration

designPrinciples: Cream + black is the entire color system. No grey, no accent color.
Typography does the heavy lifting; UI chrome is minimal.
Monospace = UI/labels/secondary. Sans-serif = headlines/content. Never mix the roles.
Whitespace is structural — sections breathe with 100-200px vertical padding.
Lines, not shadows. Hierarchy via 1px hairlines between sections and cells.
Photos are framed in rounded rectangles, never bleeding to edge.
Numbers are prefixed with zero ('01' not '1') — gives every list a rhythmic, editorial feel.

applicabilityNotes.fitForPhotographyPortfolioSite: Strong fit — the template is built around large photography blocks with editorial typography around them. Adapts naturally to a fotograafpromotieradboud.nl context.
adjustments: Swap agency-tone copy for warmer first-person voice ('I' not 'we').
Consider one subtle accent color (deep burgundy or ink blue) to nod to academic tradition without breaking the cream/black system.
Replace abstract line icons with photo-specific marks (camera, calendar, document) or omit icons entirely.
Lean into the editorial monospace for protocol terms (paranimfen, pedel, hora est) — gives gravitas appropriate to academic ceremony.
